calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

David Wasserman, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Gordon Property Management.
Plaintiff's Witness Stephanie Gordon was sworn and direct examined.

No appearance by Defendant Caleb Lawton.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 954 Geary St., #56 San Francisco, CA 94109.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent - $1,977.00
Holdover Damages - $1,478.40
Costs - $385.00
Total - $3840.40.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Gordon Property Management present. Represented by Stephanie Gordon .
Attorney Marina Franco appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Caleb Lawton is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of MAR-19-2012 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
